---
title: "kff-data-build"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# load packages
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, lubridate, readxl)
```

```{r}
# read data
kff.dat <- read_excel('../data/input/mcaid-expansion/reformatted_kff_data.xlsx')
kff.dat
```

```{r}
# clean data
## create variable for mcaid expansion
kff.final <- kff.dat %>%
  mutate(expanded = (`Expansion Status` == 'Adopted'))

# make variable for date adopted
kff.final <- kff.final %>%
  mutate(date_adopted = mdy(na_if(`Implementation Date`, "N/A"))) %>%
  rename(State = Location) %>% 
  select(State, expanded, date_adopted)

kff.final

write_csv(kff.final,'../data/output/medicaid-kff.csv')
```
